case_title: COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. VS. 242 COLUMBUS AVENUE LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED ON 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) BIERGARTEN, LLC. OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) BIERGARTEN, LLC AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 242 COLUMBUS AVENUE LLC DBA TOSCA CAFE $15,400.15 PRINCIPAL, $1,875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,013.23 INTEREST, $455.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,743.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 65885495)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-24-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
